'''Outpost DX-11a''' was a [[XQ6 Platform]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It had two squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].

==History==
Imperial defector [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Zaletta]] was stationed on this station when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] were sent by the [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] to locate Zaletta. After destroying the TIE Fighters, and subsequently disabling the station's shields, four [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] launched from the station to evacuate the personnel, the [[AA-23|last]] of these was carrying Zaletta. After Zaletta received the rebel's signal and rendezvoused with the [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']], the X-wings destroyed the station.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
